title: Merge lanes after an if condition in workflow
excerpt: I believe Workflow is missing the ability to merge lanes back together after they’ve been split by an if condition. If all the specific actions have been made to the if statement, and that we are back to general actions …

posts.author: PhilippeL (Philippe Lacombe)
posts.cookedHtml:
I believe Workflow is missing the ability to merge lanes back together after they’ve been split by an if condition. If all the specific actions have been made to the if statement, and that we are back to general actions that affect both lanes, I currently have to create the same block in both lanes, all the way until the end of the process. Here is an example of how I have to do it currently:

image804×626 39.7 KB

And here is how i’d like to be able to do it:

image626×1063 18.5 KB

posts.author: Izzy (Israel Benson)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we integrate Whatsapp to import all incoming messages and requests but be tagged back to an Item or Board?. @JoelMorl

posts.author: DLynch (Deb Lynch)
posts.cookedHtml: Definitely something that would be extremely useful.

posts.author: MRad (M Rad)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes the current constraints lead to excess computational time and slow automations where complex!
There’s another feature request for AND/OR conditions that folks might like to check out:

Multiple Columns in One Trigger Step (AND/OR) - Workflows and Automations Feature requests
Hello, Interesting post!! I’m agree on the impementation of And/Or logics in workflows and automations. I also need this logic for triggers. And I also find that coming back to the main branching let us same lots of time instead of duplicates all common remaing steps. Thanks +1 vote

posts.author: FdL (Franck de Luca)
posts.cookedHtml:
I wanted to convert some of my automations to workflow, but this is impossible without this merge function.
Hope this will be resolved soon.

posts.author: darrylclark (Darryl)
posts.cookedHtml: Yep would love this because right now I love the multibranch piece but I hit a dead end if I then want to run other actions and end up either duplicating or running another workflow
